description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Find a roughly 30-day inpatient alcohol-focused program that offers private rooms and costs under $15,000, then submit an information request form for that program.

tasks.instruction: Choose an outpatient or intensive outpatient opioid treatment program that offers at least three evening sessions per week and has an average rating of 4.5+ stars from at least 20 reviews, then book an evening consultation for that program.

target_names: Los Angeles Evening Intensive Outpatient for Opioid Recovery

tasks.instruction: Using insurance verification for a selected insurer and ZIP code 94103 within 25 miles, find the lowest-priced 60-day residential program that accepts that insurance and start an insurance check for it.

tasks.instruction: Register a family member for the earliest available Wednesday evening family support group within the next 30 days and within about 20 miles of ZIP code 90001.

tasks.instruction: Complete the online assessment, then from your recommendations select an inpatient or residential program of about 30 days in length and submit a request-for-call form about that specific program.

tasks.instruction: In the resource library, search for benzodiazepine withdrawal, filter to text articles or blog posts from the last 2 years, and add 3 articles focused on symptoms, timelines, or management to your reading list.

target_names: Benzodiazepine Withdrawal Symptoms: What to Expect

tasks.instruction: Within a single state, compare two treatment centers’ visitation days and family counseling frequency, then start an admission inquiry for the center that allows visits on both Saturday and Sunday and offers at least one family counseling session per week.
